---
title: "Data & Code"
---

This page collects public datasets, code, replication packages, and research resources.

## Public Data

Add data projects here.

## Code and Replication Packages

Add GitHub, Zenodo, OSF, SSRN, or journal replication links here.

## Notes

Avoid hosting very large datasets directly inside the website repository. For large files, use a stable external repository and link to it.
